'''鈭歵h-dh-t''' ('''thadhata''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preboard|preboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preboard|preboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| thadhata
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhatithi|thadhatithi]] || [[word:thadhatiji|thadhatiji]] || [[word:thadhatishi|thadhatishi]] || [[word:thadhati|thadhati]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhatuthuth|thadhatuthuth]] || [[word:thadhatujuj|thadhatujuj]] || [[word:thadhatushush|thadhatushush]] || [[word:thadhat|thadhat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatuthu|thadhatuthu]] || [[word:thadhatuju|thadhatuju]] || [[word:thadhatushu|thadhatushu]] || [[word:thadhatu|thadhatu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatufuth|thadhatufuth]] || [[word:thadhatufuj|thadhatufuj]] || [[word:thadhatufush|thadhatufush]] || [[word:thadhatuf|thadhatuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhatethe|thadhatethe]] || [[word:thadhateje|thadhateje]] || [[word:thadhateshe|thadhateshe]] || [[word:thadhate|thadhate]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhatothoth|thadhatothoth]] || [[word:thadhatojoj|thadhatojoj]] || [[word:thadhatoshosh|thadhatoshosh]] || [[word:thadhat|thadhat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatotho|thadhatotho]] || [[word:thadhatojo|thadhatojo]] || [[word:thadhatosho|thadhatosho]] || [[word:thadhato|thadhato]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatofoth|thadhatofoth]] || [[word:thadhatofoj|thadhatofoj]] || [[word:thadhatofosh|thadhatofosh]] || [[word:thadhatof|thadhatof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadhat忙th忙|thadhat忙th忙]] || [[word:thadhat忙j忙|thadhat忙j忙]] || [[word:thadhat忙sh忙|thadhat忙sh忙]] || [[word:thadhat忙|thadhat忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadhatathath|thadhatathath]] || [[word:thadhatajaj|thadhatajaj]] || [[word:thadhatashash|thadhatashash]] || [[word:thadhat|thadhat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatatha|thadhatatha]] || [[word:thadhataja|thadhataja]] || [[word:thadhatasha|thadhatasha]] || [[word:thadhata|thadhata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatafath|thadhatafath]] || [[word:thadhatafaj|thadhatafaj]] || [[word:thadhatafash|thadhatafash]] || [[word:thadhataf|thadhataf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thadhatasha|thadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothadhatasha|gothadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithadhatasha|gokithadhatasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadhatn眉sha|thadhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothadhatnkn眉sha|gothadhatnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhatn眉sha|gokithadhatn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadhatsh毛sha|thadhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadhatnksh毛sha|gothadhatnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadhatsh毛sha|gokithadhatsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhatrosha|thadhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhatnkrosha|gothadhatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhatrosha|gokithadhatrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatmusha|thadhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhatnkmusha|gothadhatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhatmusha|gokithadhatmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thadhatsherasha|thadhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothadhatnksherasha|gothadhatnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithadhatsherasha|gokithadhatsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thadhatngasha|thadhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothadhatnkngasha|gothadhatnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithadhatngasha|gokithadhatngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thadhatyasha|thadhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothadhatnkyasha|gothadhatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithadhatyasha|gokithadhatyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thadhatyamasha|thadhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothadhatnkyamasha|gothadhatnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithadhatyamasha|gokithadhatyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhatn眉sh毛sha|thadhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhatnkn眉sh毛sha|gothadhatnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhatn眉sh毛sha|gokithadhatn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhatn眉rosha|thadhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhatnkn眉rosha|gothadhatnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhatn眉rosha|gokithadhatn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatn眉musha|thadhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhatnkn眉musha|gothadhatnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhatn眉musha|gokithadhatn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhatsh毛n眉sha|thadhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhatnksh毛n眉sha|gothadhatnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhatsh毛n眉sha|gokithadhatsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhatsh毛rosha|thadhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhatnksh毛rosha|gothadhatnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhatsh毛rosha|gokithadhatsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatsh毛musha|thadhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhatnksh毛musha|gothadhatnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhatsh毛musha|gokithadhatsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhatron眉sha|thadhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhatnkron眉sha|gothadhatnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhatron眉sha|gokithadhatron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhatrosh毛sha|thadhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhatnkrosh毛sha|gothadhatnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhatrosh毛sha|gokithadhatrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadhatromusha|thadhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadhatnkromusha|gothadhatnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadhatromusha|gokithadhatromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadhatmun眉sha|thadhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadhatnkmun眉sha|gothadhatnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadhatmun眉sha|gokithadhatmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadhatmush毛sha|thadhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadhatnkmush毛sha|gothadhatnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadhatmush毛sha|gokithadhatmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadhatmurosha|thadhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadhatnkmurosha|gothadhatnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadhatmurosha|gokithadhatmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thadhat|thadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:th忙dh忙t|th忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothadhat|hothadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoth忙dh忙t|hoth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothadhat|hohothadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoth忙dh忙t|hohoth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉thadhat|n眉thadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉th忙dh忙t|n眉th忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉thadhat|n眉n眉thadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉th忙dh忙t|n眉n眉th忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂thadhat|n茂thadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂th忙dh忙t|n茂th忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂thadhat|n茂n茂thadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂th忙dh忙t|n茂n茂th忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthadhat|luthadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luth忙dh忙t|luth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthadhat|luluthadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluth忙dh忙t|luluth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithadhat|lithadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lith忙dh忙t|lith忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithadhat|lilithadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilith忙dh忙t|lilith忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothadhat|kothadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koth忙dh忙t|koth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothadhat|kokothadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoth忙dh忙t|kokoth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethadhat|kethadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keth忙dh忙t|keth忙dh忙t]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethadhat|kekethadhat]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketh忙dh忙t|keketh忙dh忙t]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
